top_hold_reasons: CI evidence is partial or generated sample metadata; independent CI evidence is still needed.
Manifest metadata has rights, privacy, evaluation-boundary, or staleness gaps.
top_block_reasons: Negative-control fixture includes release/deploy language that a local QIRA pilot cannot authorize.
Action use is blocked and declared disallowed uses cannot be upgraded by a manifest-only pilot.

vertical_summaries.name: AgentSec Gate
vertical_summaries.scope: local/offline MCP or tool manifest review
key_next_actions: review HOLD/BLOCK findings with repository owner
add public-safe fixture only if the pattern is generic and non-secret
keep private policy calibration outside the public repository

vertical_summaries.name: QIRA-Code ReleaseGate
key_next_actions: review HOLD/BLOCK findings with repository owner
request copied or local CI evidence before any second-run readout
add public-safe fixture only if the pattern is generic and non-secret
keep private scoring calibration outside the public repository

vertical_summaries.name: DataCapsule / AIDREG Engine
key_next_actions: review HOLD/BLOCK findings with data owner or data steward
request license, terms, privacy, consent, and split-policy evidence
add public-safe fixture only if the pattern is generic and non-secret
keep private calibration outside the public repository

known_limits: no external APIs or GitHub APIs
no crawling, URL fetching, raw private data inspection, upload, or model training
not certification, proof, legal opinion, privacy audit, license clearance, quality guarantee, product-readiness claim, or action authorization
private weights, thresholds, provider priors, anti-gaming logic, private negative controls, private probe seeds, and commercial routing policy remain non-public
